name: Patient 7
history: History of long work hours in demanding environments. Unresolved issues with father including past abuse. Recent exchange of letters addressing history.
worthless_belief: I am bad - dangerous, toxic, evil
intermediate_belief: If I'm not constantly productive, I'm worthless like my father.
intermediate_belief_depression: The abuse damaged me permanently; I'll never be whole.
coping_strategies: Overworking, emotional numbness, avoiding idle time.
situation: Reflecting on how to use idle time and focus on personal development.
auto_thought: "I don't know who I am without work. I'm wasting time. I should be doing something productive."
behavior: Creates overly ambitious self-improvement plan, then procrastinates, then berates self.
